candidate_definitions.text: One stop solution for all Vulkan samples
Pascal bindings to the C API for BGFX, "a cross-platform, graphics API agnostic, Bring Your Own Engine/Framework style rendering library".
Pascal bindings to the C API for [BGFX](https://github.com/bkaradzic/bgfx), "a cross-platform, graphics API agnostic, Bring Your Own Engine/Framework style rendering library".
Minimalist tutorial and code for doing something meaningful with Vulkan in 2026

Home of a minimalist tutorial on how to use the Vulkan graphics API in 2026. The idea is to get people started with rasterization in Vulkan using commonly supported features to make the API easier to use. This is a single page tutorial that can be done from top to bottom in a si…
